scores.rationale: Completely hallucinates content not in the essay (e.g., Mars, cotton candy imagery) and provides irrelevant, vague advice that fails to address the actual text.
Accurately references specific essay details like mission duration and atmospheric conditions, but overlooks severe mechanical errors and offers somewhat broad suggestions.
Correctly identifies repetitive language and superficial arguments but invents non-existent details ('inventoried lands') and provides vague structural recommendations.
